_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review feedback on customer satisfaction and internal service performance to foster continual improvement.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, maintaining service quality as data volume, consumer count, and pipeline complexity increase.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-006 (TF, cosine: 0.357), AB-T-002 (AB, cosine: 0.337).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.349). Shared vocabulary: [service]. DCWF-only terms [continual, customer, feedback, foster, improvement, internal] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.876, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.6%). "Review feedback on customer satisfaction and internal service performance to fos" and "Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, m" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.382 ≈ STS 0.349 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [service]. DCWF-only: [continual, customer, feedback, foster, improvement, internal]. WIDAI-only: [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design].
